description: The _class object and static class string should combine correctly
initialVDOM: dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('button', 'btn', { class: 'btn', _class: { active: state.active, error: state.error } }, [dom.txt('Click me', 'txt')])])

assertions.description: Button should have btn and active classes

steps.newVDOM: dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('button', 'btn', { class: 'btn', _class: { active: state.active, error: state.error } }, [dom.txt('Click me', 'txt')])])

assertions.description: Button should only have btn class

steps.newVDOM: dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('button', 'btn', { class: 'btn', _class: { active: state.active, error: state.error } }, [dom.txt('Click me', 'txt')])])

assertions.description: Button should have btn and error classes

steps.newVDOM: dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('button', 'btn', { class: 'btn', _class: { active: state.active, error: state.error } }, [dom.txt('Click me', 'txt')])])

assertions.description: Button should have btn, active, and error classes
